title: solanum tomentosum subsp. coccineum
intro: Solanum tomentosum subsp. coccineum, also known as the crimson nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum tomentosum plant, which belongs to the nightshade family (Solanaceae). The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, as it contains alkaloids and glycosides, which are known to have antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Solanum tomentosum subsp. coccineum include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and burns, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
